news.t: S&P 500 Momentum Ranked Top Buy This Month By Artificial Intelligence
Best Consumer Staples ETFs for Q2 2021
Pandemic germ-killer stocks rally, but consumer staples ETFs underperform

holdings.infoBox: PSL is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Casey's General Stores stock at 6.56%, Costco Wholesale at 5.14%, US Foods Holding at 4.87%, Church & Dwight Co. at 4.60%, and Performance Food Group Company at 4.50%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Consumer Staples Momentum ETF (PSL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund tracks an index of US consumer non-cyclical firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PSL was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: Using the Forbes AI Investor platform, we have compiled the top ETFs to buy this month across every major category.

data.title: Best Consumer Staples ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best consumer staples ETFs for Q2 2021 are IYK, ECON, and PSL.

data.title: Pandemic germ-killer stocks rally, but consumer staples ETFs underperform
data.text: Consumer staples exchange-traded funds underperformed Friday, even as personal hygiene products notched some of the biggest gains of the S&P 500 SPX, +0.00% .
